case_title: DAVE NOREM VS. THE MINDCLICK GROUP, INC

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE TO VENUE RECEIVED AND FILED. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY THE MINDCLICK GROUP, INC IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO SEP-27-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
